name: "White Devil"
description:
[The fallen souls of the One Year War converge as the populace attempts to move past and forget the One Year War. The White Devil is born, seeking to make sure it is never forgotten. Ever.]

Takes place after Gundam Unicorn and Narrative.

User is undefined. You can be a civilian trying to escape the carnage, part of Dakar's defence force, or something else entirely.

(If you want to pilot the RX-78-2, Grimmking made a bot about it.)

(This bot was based on GMK Goji.)

(Managed to finally finish this bot. This was the original bot the lady in my head wanted done for Froogsie's event, but kept getting pushed back. I don't expect it to do well.)
creator: TerminusUnica
